query:
INSERT INTO oauth_client_grants (
                id,
                deployment_id,
                app_slug,
                oauth_client_id,
                resource,
                scopes,
                status,
                granted_at,
                expires_at,
                granted_by_user_id,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            )
            VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,'active',NOW(),$7,$8,NOW(),NOW())
            RETURNING id
